# Saga Labs

AI engineering studio specializing in agentic AI, MCP servers, and AI automations. Builds and ships its own consumer apps as proof of execution and takes on selected client projects.

## What we do

- **Agentic AI flows** — design and ship multi-step agents that plan, call tools, handle failure modes, and run reliably in production. Anthropic, OpenAI, on-device LLMs.
- **MCP servers** — Model Context Protocol servers that expose internal models, APIs, or data to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, OpenClaw and any other MCP-compatible client.
- **AI automations** — workflows that replace manual ops: lead enrichment, ticket triage, content pipelines, on-call response, internal copilots.
- **Production hardening** — turning AI prototypes into reliable services: cost control, rate-limiting, abuse defence, observability, OAuth and DCR.
- **Custom integrations** — Anthropic, OpenAI, Kie.ai, ElevenLabs, Firebase, Stripe, RevenueCat, Twilio. Wired into iOS, web, or backend.

## Proof points

- **Dora MCP** — multi-model AI image and video generation server we built and host. Fourteen models behind one OAuth-secured endpoint at https://doravideo.com/mcp. Listed in the official MCP Registry, in Smithery, and in the Cursor Directory. Works with Claude, ChatGPT Pro and Enterprise, Cursor, OpenClaw and other MCP clients.
- **Pinku Private AI** — on-device assistant running Llama, Qwen and DeepSeek with zero cloud calls and zero data collection.
- **Dora iOS** — multi-model AI video and image generation, in production on the App Store.

## Key facts

- Founded 2023.
- Public contact email: sagalabs@proton.me
- Website: https://aisagalab.com/
- Active across iOS, web, MCP servers, agentic backends.
- Engagement model: short briefs (two to twelve weeks). Asynchronous-first. Fixed-scope or staged-gates depending on uncertainty.

## Apps shipped

Each app doubles as a public showcase of internal capability.

- **Dora** — multi-model AI video and image generator (https://aisagalab.com/ai-video-generator.html)
- **Pinku Private AI** — on-device assistant (https://aisagalab.com/pinku.html)
- **3 Tasks** — daily productivity (https://aisagalab.com/3things.html)
- **Brainy** — AI image generation (https://aisagalab.com/brainy.html)
- **Crypton** — crypto portfolio tracker (https://aisagalab.com/crypton.html)
- **Keeper** — encrypted gallery vault (https://aisagalab.com/keeper.html)
- **Fast AI** — multi-model AI chat (https://aisagalab.com/fastai.html)

## Contact

Email: sagalabs@proton.me
For project enquiries, include problem, surface (iOS / web / MCP / backend), timeline, and budget range.
